title: Luminous Glow Vitamin C Serum
description: A brightening serum infused with 15% pure vitamin C to even skin tone and reduce dullness. Lightweight formula absorbs quickly, leaving a radiant finish without stickiness.

attributes.ingredients: Vitamin C (15%), Hyaluronic Acid, Ferulic Acid, Aloe Vera Extract
attributes.usage_instructions: Apply 2-3 drops to clean skin morning and night before moisturizer.

title: SilkTouch Hydrating Face Cream
description: A rich, non‑greasy cream that delivers 24‑hour moisture with a blend of shea butter and ceramides. Ideal for dry to very dry skin, it restores barrier function and leaves skin feeling plush.

attributes.ingredients: Shea Butter, Ceramide Complex, Glycerin, Jojoba Oil
attributes.usage_instructions: Massage a pea‑size amount onto face and neck after cleansing, morning and night.

title: PureLeaf Organic Facial Cleanser
description: Gentle foaming cleanser made with organic green tea and chamomile to soothe sensitive skin while removing makeup and pollutants. Free from sulfates and parabens.

attributes.ingredients: Organic Green Tea Extract, Chamomile Flower Water, Coconut‑derived Surfactants
attributes.usage_instructions: Dispense a small amount onto wet hands, massage onto face, rinse thoroughly.

title: Midnight Matte Liquid Lipstick
description: Long‑wearing liquid lipstick with a velvety matte finish. The richly pigmented formula stays put for up to 12 hours without drying the lips.

attributes.ingredients: Silicone Resin, Vitamin E, Jojoba Oil, Pigments
attributes.usage_instructions: Apply directly from the bullet to clean, dry lips. Reapply if needed.

title: SunGuard SPF 50+ Mineral Sunscreen Lotion
description: Broad‑spectrum mineral sunscreen that provides SPF 50+ protection while delivering a non‑greasy, sheer finish. Formulated with zinc oxide and titanium dioxide, it is reef‑safe.

attributes.ingredients: Zinc Oxide (15%), Titanium Dioxide (5%), Aloe Vera, Vitamin E
attributes.usage_instructions: Apply generous layer 15 minutes before sun exposure and reapply every 2 hours.

title: GlowRush Illuminating Primer
description: A silky primer that blurs pores and adds a subtle radiance to the complexion, extending makeup wear. Contains mica and niacinamide for a smooth canvas.

attributes.usage_instructions: Smooth a thin layer over cleansed skin before foundation.

title: BotaniCalm Calming Face Mist
description: Refreshing mist infused with cucumber, rose water, and oat extract to calm redness and hydrate throughout the day. Ideal for post‑workout or office refresh.

attributes.ingredients: Cucumber Extract, Rose Water, Oat Beta‑Glucan, Glycerin
attributes.usage_instructions: Hold bottle 15 cm from face and spritz 2–3 times. Do not rinse.

title: NightRenew Retinol Night Cream
description: A potent night cream featuring 0.5% retinol, peptides, and squalane to promote cell turnover and improve fine lines while you sleep. Suitable for experienced retinol users.

attributes.ingredients: Retinol (0.5%), Peptide Complex, Squalane, Shea Butter
attributes.usage_instructions: Apply a pea‑size amount to face after cleansing, avoiding eye area.

title: PureSilk Waterproof Mascara
description: Intense black mascara that delivers volume and curl while resisting smudges and humidity for up to 24 hours. Comes with a tapered brush for precise application.

attributes.ingredients: Water, Beeswax, Carnauba Wax, Pigments, Vitamin E
attributes.usage_instructions: Apply from root to tip in a zig‑zag motion. Add second coat for extra volume.

title: AquaPure Mineral Face Powder
description: Translucent mineral powder that sets makeup, controls shine, and blurs imperfections. Formulated with finely milled mica and zinc oxide for a breathable finish.

attributes.ingredients: Mica, Zinc Oxide, Silica, Kaolin Clay
attributes.usage_instructions: Dust lightly over foundation using a fluffy brush.

title: GlowBloom Rosehip Oil Facial Elixir
description: Cold‑pressed rosehip seed oil rich in omega‑3 and vitamin A, perfect for brightening scars and improving elasticity. Absorbs quickly, leaving a subtle satin sheen.

attributes.ingredients: Rosehip Seed Oil, Vitamin A, Vitamin C, Vitamin E
attributes.usage_instructions: Massage 2–3 drops onto clean skin before moisturizer, morning and night.

title: SilkEssence Ultra Hydrating Sheet Mask
description: Individually packaged sheet mask soaked in a serum of hyaluronic acid, niacinamide, and green tea for an instant boost of moisture and radiance.

attributes.ingredients: Hyaluronic Acid, Niacinamide, Green Tea Extract, Glycerin
attributes.usage_instructions: Apply to clean face, leave on 15‑20 minutes, then pat remaining serum into skin.

title: PureGlow Illuminating Highlighter
description: Fine, buttery highlighter that catches light for a radiant, lit‑from‑within glow. Available in a universally flattering champagne shade.

attributes.ingredients: Mica, Synthetic Pearl, Dimethicone, Vitamin E
attributes.usage_instructions: Sweep onto high points of the face with a fan brush and blend.
